title: Entity Chat
description: This will make villagers be able to say random things!
body:
# Entity Chat
![Quiet game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1aaad182bdf53c2178772df56e0f015d543557.png)

**A mod that will make villagers be able to say random things!**

**This mod was made for MD Craft.**

Unfortunately i didnt know how to make this server sided so its client sided for now.

If anyone wants to use this in their modpack you can!

This mod was inspired by [Dynamic Surroundings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-surroundings) so credits to OreCruncher
